UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile and core health information within the NutriKeralam application. This entity assumes an external authentication system manages user credentials.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity. This typically correlates with a user ID from an external authentication system.

currentWeightKg.description: The user's most recently recorded weight in kilograms. This can be updated from the latest WeightLog entry.

activityLevel.description: The user's self-reported physical activity level (e.g., 'sedentary', 'moderately active', 'very active').

dietaryPreferences.description: A list of the user's dietary preferences or restrictions (e.g., 'vegetarian', 'vegan', 'gluten-free', 'nut-allergy').

healthConditionIds.description: References to HealthCondition entities associated with the user, indicating their health concerns. (Relationship: UserProfile N:N HealthCondition)

preferredLanguage.description: The user's preferred language for the application interface and AI interactions (e.g., 'en' for English, 'ml' for Malayalam).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

HealthCondition.title: HealthCondition
HealthCondition.description: Defines a health condition for which tailored diet plans can be provided.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HealthCondition entity.

name.description: The common name of the health condition (e.g., 'Diabetes', 'PCOS', 'Pregnancy').

description.description: A detailed description of the health condition and its implications for diet.

DietPlan.title: DietPlan
DietPlan.description: Represents a personalized diet plan generated for a user, potentially in response to health conditions or goals.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DietPlan entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this diet plan. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N DietPlan)

healthConditionId.description: Optional reference to a HealthCondition this diet plan is designed for. (Relationship: HealthCondition 1:N DietPlan)

name.description: A descriptive name for the diet plan (e.g., 'My Diabetes Plan', 'Weight Loss Plan').

description.description: A brief summary or goal of the diet plan.

startDate.description: The date when this diet plan officially began.

endDate.description: The date when this diet plan is scheduled to conclude.

isActive.description: Indicates if this is the user's currently active diet plan.

dailyCalorieTarget.description: The target daily calorie intake for this diet plan in kilocalories.

generatedByAI.description: Indicates if this diet plan was initially generated or significantly modified by the AI coach.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the diet plan was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the diet plan was last updated.

MealPlanEntry.title: MealPlanEntry
MealPlanEntry.description: Represents a single meal recommendation for a specific day and meal type within a DietPlan.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MealPlanEntry entity.

dietPlanId.description: Reference to the DietPlan this meal entry belongs to. (Relationship: DietPlan 1:N MealPlanEntry)

dayOfWeek.description: The day of the week for which this meal is recommended (e.g., 'Monday', 'Tuesday', or 'Any').

recipeId.description: Reference to the Recipe recommended for this meal plan entry. (Relationship: Recipe 1:N MealPlanEntry)

servingSize.description: The recommended serving size for the recipe (e.g., '1 serving', '200g', '2 chapatis').

notes.description: Any additional notes or specific instructions for this meal entry from the diet plan.

FoodItem.title: FoodItem
FoodItem.description: Represents a single, raw or basic food item with its detailed nutritional breakdown, forming the comprehensive Indian food database.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FoodItem entity.

name.description: The common name of the food item (e.g., 'Basmati Rice', 'Mango', 'Coconut Oil').

description.description: A brief description or common preparation of the food item.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image illustrating the food item.

category.description: The food group or category of the item (e.g., 'Grain', 'Fruit', 'Vegetable', 'Dairy', 'Spice').

isUserCreated.description: Indicates if this food item was added by a user (true) or is part of the system's default database (false).

caloriesKcal.description: Energy content per 100g or standard serving in kilocalories.

proteinG.description: Protein content per 100g or standard serving in grams.

carbohydratesG.description: Total carbohydrate content per 100g or standard serving in grams.

fatG.description: Total fat content per 100g or standard serving in grams.

fiberG.description: Fiber content per 100g or standard serving in grams.

sugarG.description: Sugar content per 100g or standard serving in grams.

sodiumMg.description: Sodium content per 100g or standard serving in milligrams.

calciumMg.description: Calcium content per 100g or standard serving in milligrams.

ironMg.description: Iron content per 100g or standard serving in milligrams.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the food item entry was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the food item entry was last updated.

Recipe.title: Recipe
Recipe.description: Represents a complete recipe, including ingredients and preparation instructions, which can be user-created or part of the system's database.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Recipe entity.

name.description: The name of the recipe (e.g., 'Dal Tadka', 'Kerala Fish Curry').

description.description: A brief overview of the recipe, its taste, or origin.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the prepared dish.

prepTimeMinutes.description: Estimated time required for preparation steps in minutes.

cookTimeMinutes.description: Estimated time required for cooking in minutes.

servings.description: The number of servings this recipe is designed to yield.

instructions.description: A list of step-by-step instructions for preparing the recipe.

cuisineType.description: The regional or cultural cuisine type of the recipe (e.g., 'South Indian', 'North Indian', 'Keralan').

isPublic.description: Indicates if the recipe is publicly visible to all users (true) or private to the creator (false).

userId.description: Optional reference to the UserProfile who created this recipe, if it's a user-generated recipe. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Recipe)

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the recipe was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the recipe was last updated.

RecipeIngredient.title: RecipeIngredient
RecipeIngredient.description: A join entity linking a Recipe to a FoodItem, specifying the quantity and unit of an ingredient within that recipe.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RecipeIngredient entity.

recipeId.description: Reference to the Recipe this ingredient belongs to. (Relationship: Recipe 1:N RecipeIngredient)

foodItemId.description: Reference to the FoodItem that constitutes this ingredient. (Relationship: FoodItem 1:N RecipeIngredient)

quantity.description: The numerical amount of the ingredient used in the recipe.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the ingredient's quantity (e.g., 'grams', 'ml', 'cup', 'tsp', 'piece').

notes.description: Additional notes about the ingredient's preparation (e.g., 'chopped', 'diced', 'peeled').

MealLog.title: MealLog
MealLog.description: Records a user's actual meal consumption, including when it was eaten and estimated total nutrition.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MealLog entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who logged this meal. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N MealLog)

timestamp.description: The exact date and time when the meal was logged.

notes.description: Any personal notes or reflections the user added about this meal.

totalCaloriesKcal.description: The estimated total energy content of the meal in kilocalories, calculated from its MealLogItems.

totalProteinG.description: The estimated total protein content of the meal in grams, calculated from its MealLogItems.

totalCarbohydratesG.description: The estimated total carbohydrate content of the meal in grams, calculated from its MealLogItems.

totalFatG.description: The estimated total fat content of the meal in grams, calculated from its MealLogItems.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the meal log entry was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the meal log entry was last updated.

MealLogItem.title: MealLogItem
MealLogItem.description: Represents a single food item or recipe consumed as part of a MealLog.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MealLogItem entity.

mealLogId.description: Reference to the MealLog this item belongs to. (Relationship: MealLog 1:N MealLogItem)

foodItemId.description: Optional reference to a FoodItem logged. At least one of foodItemId or recipeId must be present. (Relationship: FoodItem 1:N MealLogItem)

recipeId.description: Optional reference to a Recipe logged. At least one of foodItemId or recipeId must be present. (Relationship: Recipe 1:N MealLogItem)

quantity.description: The numerical amount of the food item or recipe consumed.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the quantity (e.g., 'grams', 'ml', 'cup', 'serving', 'piece').

recognizedFromImage.description: Indicates if this log item was initially identified via visual food recognition (true) or manually entered (false).

confidenceScore.description: The confidence score (0-1) provided by the AI's food recognition model, if applicable.

WeightLog.title: WeightLog
WeightLog.description: Records a user's weight measurement at a specific point in time for progress tracking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WeightLog entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who recorded this weight. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N WeightLog)

timestamp.description: The exact date and time when the weight was recorded.

weightKg.description: The user's weight in kilograms at the time of recording.

notes.description: Any additional notes the user added about this weight entry.

ActivityLog.title: ActivityLog
ActivityLog.description: Records a user's physical activity session for overall health and progress tracking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ActivityLog entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who performed this activity. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N ActivityLog)

timestamp.description: The exact date and time when the activity took place.

activityType.description: The type of physical activity performed (e.g., 'Walking', 'Running', 'Yoga', 'Strength Training').

durationMinutes.description: The duration of the activity session in minutes.

caloriesBurnedKcal.description: Estimated calories burned during the activity in kilocalories.

notes.description: Any additional notes about this activity session.

LabReport.title: LabReport
LabReport.description: Stores metadata about a user's uploaded lab report PDF for automated analysis.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LabReport entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who uploaded this lab report. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N LabReport)

uploadTimestamp.description: The date and time when the lab report PDF was uploaded.

reportName.description: A descriptive name for the lab report (e.g., 'Thyrocare Lipid Profile', 'Dr. Lal PathLabs Blood Test').

reportDate.description: The date when the actual lab tests were conducted, as indicated on the report.

documentUrl.description: URL to the stored PDF document of the lab report.

status.description: The current processing status of the lab report (e.g., 'Uploaded', 'Processing', 'Analyzed', 'Error').

LabResultMarker.title: LabResultMarker
LabResultMarker.description: Stores individual parsed and analyzed markers and their values extracted from a LabReport.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LabResultMarker entity.

labReportId.description: Reference to the LabReport this marker was extracted from. (Relationship: LabReport 1:N LabResultMarker)

markerName.description: The name of the specific lab marker (e.g., 'HbA1c', 'Fasting Glucose', 'Total Cholesterol').

value.description: The numerical result value for this lab marker.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the marker value (e.g., 'mg/dL', '%', 'mmol/L').

referenceRangeMin.description: The minimum value of the established normal reference range for this marker.

referenceRangeMax.description: The maximum value of the established normal reference range for this marker.

isAbnormal.description: Indicates if the marker's value falls outside the normal reference range (true) or within it (false).

analysisNotes.description: AI-generated notes or personalized insights based on the marker's value and comparison to reference ranges.

timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when this specific lab result marker was parsed and analyzed.

AIChatSession.title: AIChatSession
AIChatSession.description: Represents a single conversational session between a user and the AI-Powered Personal Diet Coach.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AIChatSession entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who initiated this chat session. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N AIChatSession)

startTime.description: The date and time when the chat session began.

endTime.description: The date and time when the chat session ended, if applicable.

sessionType.description: The primary topic or purpose of the chat session (e.g., 'Diet Advice', 'Recipe Suggestion', 'Health Query', 'Lab Report Inquiry').

language.description: The Indian language used for this specific chat session (e.g., 'en', 'ml', 'hi').

isArchived.description: Indicates if the chat session has been archived by the user or system for historical purposes.

AIChatMessage.title: AIChatMessage
AIChatMessage.description: Represents an individual message exchanged within an AI chat session.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AIChatMessage entity.

sessionId.description: Reference to the AIChatSession this message belongs to. (Relationship: AIChatSession 1:N AIChatMessage)

senderType.description: Indicates whether the message was sent by the 'User' or the 'AI'.

content.description: The textual content of the message.

timestamp.description: The exact date and time when the message was sent.

feedbackRating.description: Optional user feedback rating (1-5 stars) for the AI's response message.

isRelevant.description: Optional user feedback indicating if the AI's response was relevant to the query.

definition.description: Stores a user's profile and core health information. Access is restricted to the owner matching `{userId}` in the path.
Globally accessible, system-managed health conditions. Read-only for all users, write access restricted to system/admin. Does not include user-specific authorization fields.

params.name: conditionId
params.description: The unique ID of the health condition.

definition.description: Stores personalized diet plans for a specific user. Access is restricted to the owner matching `{userId}` in the path. The document also includes `userId` for querying and clarity.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this diet plan.

params.name: dietPlanId
params.description: The unique ID of the diet plan.

definition.description: Represents a single meal recommendation within a user's diet plan. Access is restricted to the owner matching `{userId}` in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the parent diet plan.

params.name: dietPlanId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent diet plan.

params.name: mealPlanEntryId
params.description: The unique ID of the meal plan entry.

definition.description: Stores system-curated, public food items from the comprehensive Indian food database. Read-only for all users, write access restricted to system/admin. No user-specific authorization fields.

params.name: foodItemId
params.description: The unique ID of the system food item.

definition.description: Stores user-contributed food items that are made public. Read-only for all users. Write access is restricted to the original creator, explicitly identified by a `creatorId` field within the document for authorization independence. This collection corresponds to `isUserCreated: true` and `isPublic: true` if such a public flag existed for FoodItem.

params.name: foodItemId
params.description: The unique ID of the community food item.

definition.description: Stores private food items created by a specific user. Access is restricted to the owner matching `{userId}` in the path. Corresponds to `isUserCreated: true` and implicitly private.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this private food item.

params.name: foodItemId
params.description: The unique ID of the private food item.

definition.description: Stores system-curated, public recipes. Read-only for all users, write access restricted to system/admin. The `userId` field (creator) is typically absent, and `isPublic` is implicitly true.

params.name: recipeId
params.description: The unique ID of the system recipe.

definition.description: Ingredients for system-curated public recipes. Read-only for all users, write access restricted to system/admin. Implicitly `isPublic` and does not contain `recipeCreatorId`.

params.name: recipeId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent system recipe.

params.name: recipeIngredientId
params.description: The unique ID of the recipe ingredient.

definition.description: Stores user-contributed recipes that are made public. Read-only for all users. Write access is restricted to the original creator, explicitly identified by the `userId` field within the document for authorization independence. The `isPublic` field is true.

params.name: recipeId
params.description: The unique ID of the community recipe.

definition.description: Ingredients for user-contributed public recipes. Read-only for all users. Write access is restricted to the original recipe creator. The document will include a denormalized `recipeCreatorId` (copied from the parent `Recipe`) for authorization independence, and implicitly `isPublic`.

params.name: recipeId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent community recipe.

params.name: recipeIngredientId
params.description: The unique ID of the recipe ingredient.

definition.description: Stores private recipes created by a specific user. Access is restricted to the owner matching `{userId}` in the path. The `isPublic` field is false.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this private recipe.

params.name: recipeId
params.description: The unique ID of the private recipe.

definition.description: Ingredients for a user's private recipe. Access is restricted to the owner matching `{userId}` in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the parent private recipe.

params.name: recipeId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent private recipe.

params.name: recipeIngredientId
params.description: The unique ID of the recipe ingredient.

definition.description: Records a user's actual meal consumption. Access is restricted to the owner matching `{userId}` in the path. The document also includes `userId` for querying and clarity.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who logged this meal.

params.name: mealLogId
params.description: The unique ID of the meal log entry.

definition.description: Represents a single food item or recipe consumed as part of a MealLog. Access is restricted to the owner matching `{userId}` in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the parent meal log.

params.name: mealLogId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent meal log.

params.name: mealLogItemId
params.description: The unique ID of the meal log item.

definition.description: Records a user's weight measurement over time. Access is restricted to the owner matching `{userId}` in the path. The document also includes `userId` for querying and clarity.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who recorded this weight.

params.name: weightLogId
params.description: The unique ID of the weight log entry.

definition.description: Records a user's physical activity sessions. Access is restricted to the owner matching `{userId}` in the path. The document also includes `userId` for querying and clarity.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who performed this activity.

params.name: activityLogId
params.description: The unique ID of the activity log entry.

definition.description: Stores metadata about a user's uploaded lab report PDFs. Access is restricted to the owner matching `{userId}` in the path. The document also includes `userId` for querying and clarity.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who uploaded this lab report.

params.name: labReportId
params.description: The unique ID of the lab report.

definition.description: Stores individual parsed markers and their values extracted from a user's lab report. Access is restricted to the owner matching `{userId}` in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the parent lab report.

params.name: labReportId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent lab report.

params.name: labResultMarkerId
params.description: The unique ID of the lab result marker.

definition.description: Represents a user's conversational session with the AI coach. Access is restricted to the owner matching `{userId}` in the path. The document also includes `userId` for querying and clarity.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who initiated this chat session.

params.name: chatSessionId
params.description: The unique ID of the AI chat session.

definition.description: Represents an individual message exchanged within an AI chat session. Access is restricted to the owner matching `{userId}` in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the parent chat session.

params.name: chatSessionId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent AI chat session.

params.name: chatMessageId
params.description: The unique ID of the chat message.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure for NutriKeralam is designed with a strong emphasis on Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and consistent Access Modeling to ensure security, scalability, and debuggability.

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL):** This principle is primarily achieved by: 
1.  **Path-Based Ownership:** For all user-specific data (e.g., UserProfile, DietPlans, MealLogs, LabReports, Chat Sessions), documents are nested directly under `/users/{userId}/`. This makes `request.auth.uid == userId` the foundational rule for all read/write operations within these subcollections, eliminating the need for `get()` calls to verify ownership. For example, a user's `DietPlan` is at `/users/{userId}/dietPlans/{dietPlanId}`, and its `MealPlanEntry` is at `/users/{userId}/dietPlans/{dietPlanId}/mealPlanEntries/{mealPlanEntryId}`. The `userId` is always available in the path, ensuring atomic and independent authorization checks.
2.  **Denormalization of Authorization Context:** For shared or community data where ownership might influence write access (e.g., user-contributed public recipes), the `creatorId` (owner) is denormalized directly into the document itself (e.g., `communityRecipes/{recipeId}` will have a `creatorId` field, and `communityRecipes/{recipeId}/ingredients/{recipeIngredientId}` will denormalize `recipeCreatorId`). This allows security rules to check `request.auth.uid == resource.data.creatorId` or `request.auth.uid == resource.data.recipeCreatorId` without requiring `get()` calls to a parent document or another collection, thus preventing issues with atomic operations and simplifying rule debugging.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):** This structure supports secure `list` operations through **Structural Segregation** and clear access models:
1.  **Segregation of Data Posture:** Data is segregated into distinct top-level collections based on its security posture:
    *   `/users/{userId}/...`: Private user data, implicitly filtered by `userId`. List operations here are automatically secure as they are scoped to the authenticated user.
    *   `/systemFoodItems/{foodItemId}` and `/systemRecipes/{recipeId}`: System-managed, publicly readable collections. Write access is restricted to administrative roles (not detailed in this output, but would be handled via `/roles_admin/{uid}`). All items in these collections are intended for public consumption, so `allow list: true` is safe.
    *   `/communityFoodItems/{foodItemId}` and `/communityRecipes/{recipeId}`: User-contributed public items. These are publicly readable. Write access is restricted to the original `creatorId` (denormalized in the document) or admin. `list` operations are safe as all documents within are publicly visible.
    *   `/healthConditions/{conditionId}`: System-managed, public read-only collection. Safe for `list` operations.
2.  **Explicit Ownership:** By placing user-owned data under their respective `/users/{userId}/` paths, `list` queries from an authenticated user automatically only return their own data, preventing data leakage and ensuring rules are not used as filters.

**Additional Principles Adherence:**
*   **DBAC:** Roles are implicitly handled via `creatorId` fields for community content and path-based `userId` for private content. Explicit admin roles would be handled by a dedicated `/admin_roles/{uid}` collection for checking existence.
*   **Clarity of Intent:** Collection names (e.g., `systemFoodItems`, `communityRecipes`, `privateFoodItems`) clearly denote the security posture and ownership model.
*   **Invariants:** Timestamps (`createdAt`, `updatedAt`) are standard. Ownership (via `userId`, `creatorId`) is consistently applied. State modeling uses explicit `status` or `isActive` fields.
